question: Which business segment of JnJ will be treated as a discontinued operation from August 30, 2023 onward?
answer: Selected 3 PageIndex nodes and 3 scored pages for answering.

citations.section: Exhibit 99.1 Johnson & Johnson Announces Updated Financials and 2023 Guidance Following Completion of the Kenvue Separation

citations.text: regarding, among other things: future operating and financial performance, product development, and market position and business strategy.
